items.claim: Cody Durden is unorthodox and throws strikes he doesn't even know he's going to throw.
items.quote: I think Cody Durden's going to come out throwing strikes he doesn't even know he's going to throw. He's going to be very unorthodox

items.claim: Cody Durden is usually one step behind his opposition.
items.quote: I feel like Durden's usually always one step behind his opposition.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa has visible holes in his game.
items.quote: I see holes. I see holes in his game, man.

items.claim: Zachary Reese struggles with his gas tank and fatigues in fights.
items.quote: He started to fatigue as well. So sometimes his gas tank looks iffy.

items.claim: Zachary Reese is prone to getting caught by strikes.
items.quote: I do think Zachary Reese is prone to getting touched.

items.claim: Zachary Reese's takedown entries are not the greatest.
items.quote: his takedown entries aren't the greatest.
Ryan Gundra is not someone you want to get caught by because he has knockout power.

items.claim: Cesar Almeida is one of the best kickboxers in the UFC.
items.quote: Almeida's one of the best kickboxers in the UFC.

items.claim: Damian Pinyas cuts off the ring better than Gutierrez.
items.quote: he cuts off the ring better. He's not just a one-two merchant sometimes that I feel like Gutierrez is.

items.claim: Damian Pinyas has never gone the distance in his UFC or Contender Series career.
items.quote: we've never really seen him go the distance so far in these in his UFC, including his Dana White's Contender Series run.

items.claim: Wang Cong is a better striker than Tracy Cortez.
items.quote: objectively yeah, Wang Cong's a better striker.

items.claim: Wang Cong throws pit-pat tap strikes.
items.quote: Wang Cong does throw. She kind of throws pit-pat tap strikes.
